theme_archetype.theme: Hybrid (Light Theme for Marketing / Dark Theme for Dashboard)
theme_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Custom Premium Navy/Aviation Motif
theme_archetype.rationale: The domain is a professional productivity/marketing tool, blending Buffer's clarity with Linear's dark polish. The UI requires intense authority, data clarity, and high-end aviation-themed aesthetics based on the user's specific color choices.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous Spacing (p-8, p-12, p-24) on marketing pages. Dense, functional spacing (p-4, p-6) on Dashboard.

grids.marketing: Bento-style grids (Tetris Grid), asymmetrical arrangements, off-canvas alignments.
grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid (1-3-4 columns). H-full constraints, strict dense layout for optimal data visualization.

surfaces.marketing_cards: Flat solid background with 1px subtle border, soft ambient shadow. Crystal glass for nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F8FBFF]/70.
surfaces.dashboard_cards: bg-[#12283D] border-[#4DA8FF]/10 with subtle inner glow. Rounded-xl for premium feel, minimizing shadow dependency.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF7A1A] text-white hover:bg-[#FF7A1A]/90 hover:text-white transition-all rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-semibold
buttons.secondary: bg-[#0F2D52] text-[#F8FBFF] hover:bg-[#12283D] hover:text-[#F8FBFF] transition-all rounded-md px-6 py-3

components.navigation: Fixed header. Light mode on marketing (Glassmorphism bg-[#F8FBFF]/70 backdrop-blur-md). Sidebar in dashboard (Dark #081826 with #12283D active states).
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Dark mode inputs: bg-[#081826] border-[#4DA8FF]/20 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4DA8FF] text-[#DDEBFF].
components.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.

motion.hover_states: Smooth transitions (transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out), slight Y-axis lift on cards (-translate-y-1).
motion.micro_interactions: Sidebar collapsable animation, Skeleton loading for dashboard widgets, subtle scale on button press.

visual_cues.aviation_theme: Tasteful integration of flight paths, compass lines, altitude grids. Do not overuse. Use as subtle background textures (e.g. bg-grid-white/[0.02] or polar grid rings). Use precise UI elements reminiscent of cockpit dashboards without being cliché.

hero_background.description: Abstract minimal geometric background, aviation radar inspired for dark tech sections.

aviation_graphic.description: Minimalist glowing concentric circles, altitude lines, compass rose inspired.

marketing_team.description: Creative marketing team working, suitable for feature section or about page

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the landing page with Next.js 15 App router. Use Light theme primarily for marketing pages (#F8FBFF background).
Dashboard must be strictly Dark Premium (#081826 background, #12283D cards) with highly legible white/blue text (#DDEBFF).
Use Sora for all headings and DM Sans for body text. Enforce strict letter spacing rules.
Integrate ShadCN for standard components but override colors to match the brand palette exactly.
Implement the aviation aesthetic through subtle borders (e.g., radar lines, 1px dashed lines in grids, compass cues).
Use framer-motion for page transitions and hover states.
Never use placeholders for images. Use the provided URLs.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive and key informational elements.
